mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT * FROM system_config ORDER BY group_key ASC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config (group_key, config_key, config_value, config_name, config_type, config_options, sort_order, is_system, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{groupKey}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configName}, #{configType}, #{configOptions}, #{sortOrder}, #{isSystem}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE system_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND config_key = #{configKey}
